name: Tom Perez
subject: I need you to take urgent action on health care
body:
Take action before the GOP votes to take our care away
---
**Add your name: tell Congress to stop trying to take away our health care.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Pre-Existing-Conditions1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170502_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170502_tp_v2s1")**
Friend --

If protections for pre-existing conditions are good enough for members of Congress and their staffs, you'd think they would be good enough for the American people, too -- right?

Well, think again -- because congressional Republicans are this close to passing a new health care law, and they've been trying to gut these protections for everyone but themselves.

That's just plain absurd -- and only highlights the fact that the GOP knows these benefits help people.

So why take them away? Why exclude hardworking Americans from these protections, but give them to members of Congress who can afford their own coverage?

It just doesn't make any sense -- and it only piles one more thing on to an already catastrophic health care proposal. That's why we have to stop this bill in its tracks -- and fast, because the GOP might bring this vote to the floor as soon as tomorrow.

**So add your name to tell Congress to vote NO on this bill:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Pre-Existing-Conditions1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170502_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170502_tp_v2s1")**
This is really important work -- thank you for taking the time to make your voice heard.

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf10/4067b0a/2f0abdbc5/7e74ebc2/2863707207/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170502_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170502_tp_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf10/4067b0a/2f0abdbc5/7e74ebc3/2863707207/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170502_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170502_tp_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf10/4067b0a/2f0abdbc5/7e74ebc0/2863707207/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170502_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170502_tp_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cf10/4067b0a/2f0abdbc5/7e74ebc1/2863707207/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170502_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170502_tp_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team Maggie
subject: we messed up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4e0/414935548/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4e0/414935548/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
Unfortunately, we came up just shy of where we wanted to be in April for Democrat Jon Ossoff, the Democrat running in Georgia's special election.
Polls show that he can win this thing -- but only if he hits each and every fundraising goal between now and his upcoming election.
[**Can you please donate $3 or more now to help make up lost ground?**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4e1/414935548/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDA1MDJfb3Nzb2ZmMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e201700502_ossoff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Jon is committed to protecting access to affordable health care and defending Planned Parenthood, and he will oppose efforts to undo climate change protections.
That's why Donald Trump has said that he'll head down to Georgia to do everything he can to keep Jon out of Congress, and it's why Republicans have poured unprecedented amounts of money into this race to defeat him.
**Jon 's fighting hard but in a race this competitive, he needs all of the help we can give him. [Please donate $3 or more now -- every dollar you can -- so we can get our fundraising for Jon back on track and push him to victory.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4e1/414935548/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDA1MDJfb3Nzb2ZmMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e201700502_ossoff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4e2/414935548/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDA1MDJfb3Nzb2ZmMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRU0I5ZlE9PSI6IjMifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e201700502_ossoff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4e3/414935548/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDA1MDJfb3Nzb2ZmMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVRaUI5ZlE9PSI6IjI1In0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e201700502_ossoff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4ec/414935548/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDA1MDJfb3Nzb2ZmMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVVGeWNtRjVReUI5ZlE9PSI6IjUwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e201700502_ossoff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd49/2a380d31/155bd7a7/fef4e1/414935548/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDA1MDJfb3Nzb2ZmMl9hbGwiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e201700502_ossoff2_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for doing your part in this important race.
-- Team Maggie

name: =?utf-8?Q?Eric=20Greitens?=
subject: Update on the flooding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
body:
Peter,
Yesterday we traveled the state to thank first responders, see the damage caused by floods up close, and work alongside volunteers to prepare for more to come.

[](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=dface952f8&e=84041254e6)
I also spoke with the President, and he asked me to let the people of Missouri know that he's behind us and here to help.
Stay safe. The flooding is far from over. I know that with the strength and resilience I saw in Neosho, Van Buren, and Eureka, we will get through this together.
Yours in service,
Eric Greitens
Paid for by Greitens for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on [Facebook](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3fcf20e7a7&e=84041254e6) and [Twitter](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=be09b6dea7&e=84041254e6). Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected. If they become too much, you can [unsubscribe](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=09ceb159dc).

I also spoke with the President, and he asked me to let the people of Missouri know that he's behind us and here to help. Stay safe. The flooding is far from over. I know that with the strength and resilience I saw in Neosho, Van Buren, and Eureka, we will get through this together. Yours in service, Eric Greitens Paid for by Greitens for Missouri

name: Donnelly for Indiana
subject: A Trump Shutdown?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5586/3164024056/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter -- President Trump has tweeted some controversial things, but his tweets saying America "needs" Republicans to shut down the government may take the cake: | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5581/3164024056/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170502nd&amount=10")
---
There's a lot to unpack here. He's talking about stripping health care from millions of Americans, getting a GOP Senate supermajority, and _now he 's even calling for a government shutdown if he doesn't get his way!_
[**Chip in $5 to fight back >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5581/3164024056/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170502nd&amount=10")
---
Here's where Joe stands:
1. _**Trump 's call for a government shutdown is beyond irresponsible**_. The 2013 shutdown cost $24 billion and left veterans, seniors, and many others without needed services. Our country, quite literally, cannot afford another shutdown. **[Pitch in $5 to help Joe prevent a Trump shutdown>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5581/3164024056/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170502nd&amount=10")**

2. _**Joe will NOT support any bill that causes Hoosiers to lose health care**_**.** The current health plan proposed by House Republicans would slash protections for people with pre-existing conditions and hurt hundreds of thousands of Hoosiers. **[Pitch in $5 to help Joe fight it>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5581/3164024056/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170502nd&amount=10")**

3. **This is key:_Trump wants a 60-vote supermajority in the Senate -- we can 't let him get one._ It's critical to reelect Democrats like Joe to ensure we have a firewall against the radical Trump/GOP agenda in the Senate.**

**[Peter, will you pitch in $5 to reelect Joe and keep Trump from getting a Senate supermajority?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5581/3164024056/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170502nd&amount=10")**

Trump is willing to break all the rules until he gets what he wants. There's never been a more important time to fight back.
****[**Donate $5 >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5581/3164024056/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170502nd&amount=10")****
---
Thanks for your help,
Team Donnelly
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****
**** ****

|
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2674/7377f838/3608f01c/51fb5580/3164024056/VEsO/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")
